description: Billy and Sam Koenig contact the Playground from Vancouver, reporting a HYDRA attempt to abduct Raina led by Agent 33 disguised as May. Coulson discusses the situation with the Koenigs and begins forming a plan. Meanwhile, a news brief mentions the murder-suicide of Senator Christian Ward, and Skye and May discuss Grant Ward's guilt. Coulson decides to split the teams based on the new HYDRA threat.

transcript.line: Come on, what do you mean you can't break a hundred?
Sorry. Nothing over $20.
I've changed my mind. I'd like a chia water instead.
You got it, babe. Make it two.
Okay.
I've been thinking about our next trip. Maybe Shanghai?
You have expensive tastes.
And a wandering spirit. Be right back.
Thank you.
You know, Agent May, the whole point of embedding a tracker in somebody is that you don't have to stalk them. Or did you just come by to say...
Gonna want to make your next right. Next right. Unless you want to spend your last night on Earth In the hotel HYDRA.
How...

I'll explain later. Come here. Give me a hug. I'm not hitting on you, okay? I'm S.H.I.E.L.D. Okay, just... stay close. And stay quiet. Shh. Bye-bye, HYDRA. I'm Agent Sam Koenig. Coulson sent me. Sorry, but you're gonna need a lanyard.
I'm telling you, sir, she looked exactly like Agent May, except for the freaky facial-scar thing.
That was Agent 33. She was wearing a nanomask, disguised as May, but May electrocuted her right in the face.
Oh, that is so badass.
Sam, I'm on with the director. Thank you.
You were saying you think HYDRA was there to kidnap Raina, not kill her?
Well, we counted four two-man teams, all non-tactical, all in full surveillance mode. And the freaky one told Raina that Whitehall wanted to talk.
Question is why... and why now.
No idea, sir, but this is the first sighting we've had of HYDRA since you let Raina out in the wild.
Okay. I'm sending Agent May with an extraction team. Sit tight until they get there.
Copy that, sir.
He's sending the cavalry. Sweet!
Sam, what, are you 13? You can't do a sit-up. You think you're gonna hook up with the cal...

More news on the investigation of the horrific murder-suicide of Massachusetts Senator Christian Ward. FBI sources claim that while the senator did leave a recorded confession, other evidence found at the scene suggests another party may have been involved.
He did it. You know Ward did it.
No doubt in my mind.
The senator should've let us help.
We tried, but he wanted nothing to do with us. All we can do now is try and catch Ward.
Or put the son of a bitch down.
Change of plans. We're splitting up the teams.
We're going after Ward?
No, we're not. HYDRA found Raina. Tried to grab her in Vancouver.
Grab her. Not kill her.
They're grasping. HYDRA knows we found the city. Maybe they think she can help them.
We're pulling an extraction.
